description: Promotes calmness, stress reduction, and gentle mental clarity without inducing sleep.

decrease.label: Deep Relax
decrease.effect: Deeper relaxation with more theta influence, suitable for unwinding.

base.label: Relax
base.effect: Balanced relaxation and calm awareness using mid-alpha frequencies.

increase.label: Light Relax
increase.effect: More alert relaxation while maintaining a calm mental state.

description: Induces deep delta-wave states associated with falling asleep and restorative sleep.

decrease.label: Deep Sleep
decrease.effect: Ultra-deep delta entrainment to support physical and mental restoration.

base.label: Sleep
base.effect: Ideal for falling asleep naturally and entering deep sleep cycles.

increase.label: Light Sleep
increase.effect: Lighter delta entrainment, easier to wake from but still sleep-inducing.

description: Boosts physical motivation, alertness, and readiness for movement.

decrease.label: Warm Up
decrease.effect: Gentle stimulation suitable for starting exercise or warming up.

base.label: Exercise
base.effect: Standard beta-wave stimulation ideal for sustained movement and energy.

increase.label: Intense Exercise
increase.effect: Higher energy and motivation for intense workouts or cardio.

description: Supports deep introspection, stillness, mindfulness, and meditative absorption.

decrease.label: Deep Meditation
decrease.effect: Deep theta entrainment for introspective or spiritual meditation.

base.label: Meditate
base.effect: Balanced theta waves ideal for most meditation styles.

increase.label: Light Meditation
increase.effect: Shallower meditative state with more awareness and gentle calm.

description: Enhances concentration, mental stamina, and task-oriented attention.

decrease.label: Soft Focus
decrease.effect: Gentle focus suitable for low-pressure workloads.

base.label: Focus
base.effect: High-beta stimulation for sharp concentration and productivity.

increase.label: Intense Focus
increase.effect: Low-gamma stimulation for peak concentration and flow state.

description: Supports learning, information retention, comprehension, and mental clarity.

decrease.label: Calm Study
decrease.effect: Alpha-dominant pattern ideal for reading and relaxed learning.

base.label: Study
base.effect: Low-beta state that balances alertness and comprehension.

increase.label: Active Study
increase.effect: Stronger mental activation for fast-paced learning sessions.

description: Reduces anxiety by calming the nervous system through theta/alpha entrainment.

decrease.label: Deep Calm
decrease.effect: Deep theta for strong anxiety reduction and nervous-system resetting.

base.label: Anxiety Relief
base.effect: Balanced calming effect ideal for general anxiety relief.

increase.label: Light Calm
increase.effect: Mild relaxation without excessive sedation, good for daytime use.

description: Stimulates high mental activity, alertness, and fast cognitive processing.

decrease.label: Mild Boost
decrease.effect: Light gamma stimulation for subtle mood elevation and energy.

base.label: Energy Boost
base.effect: High gamma waves for noticeable increase in energy and alertness.

increase.label: Intense Boost
increase.effect: Strong gamma activity for rapid activation and peak mental energy.
